title: Meet SK Hynix, the trillion-dollar South Korean chipmaker debuting on U.S. markets
summary_full: Following a more than sevenfold rally in its stock price over the past year, South Korea's SK Hynix is listing on the Nasdaq.
summary_public: Following a more than sevenfold rally in its stock price over the past year, South Korea's SK Hynix is listing on the Nasdaq.
